movie.actors: Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock, David Spade
movie.plot: After moving his family back to his hometown to be with his friends and their kids, Lenny finds out that between old bullies, new bullies, schizo bus drivers, drunk cops on skis, and four hundred costumed party crashers sometimes crazy follows you.
movie.title: Grown Ups 2
movie.writer: Fred Wolf, Adam Sandler, Tim Herlihy, Adam Sandler (based on characters created by), Fred Wolf (based on characters created by)
